name: Almond and Rice Flour Bread with Poppy Seeds
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Butter an 8 x 4-inch loaf pan.
3. Place almonds and 1/2 cup of the flour in a bowl of a food processor and grind until a fine meal is formed. The flour will prevent the nuts from turning oily.
4. Add remaining rice flour, the baking powder, salt, and 2 teaspoons of the poppy seeds; process briefly.
5. Combine yogurt, water, whole egg, egg white, and oil in a measuring cup.
6. With the processor motor running, pour liquid ingredients through feed tube over the flour mixture, processing just long enough to mix.
7. Transfer batter to prepared pan. Sprinkle with remaining poppy seeds.
8. Bake for 55 minutes. Turn out onto a rack to cool. (Bread slices best after several hours, or the next day).
9. Makes one 18-ounce loaf (18 slices).
